name: New Domain Registration Detected
description: Detection of a new domain registration that could be used for malicious activities, requiring investigation.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the domain registration event.

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: The name of the newly registered domain.

parameters.name: registrant_email
parameters.description: The email address of the domain registrant.

parameters.name: registrant_name
parameters.description: The name of the domain registrant.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The IP address from which the domain registration was performed.

parameters.name: registrar
parameters.description: The domain registrar used for the registration.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The registration status of the domain (expected to be 'new').
